description: A horizontal, landscape-orientation slogan graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background photo, warm-toned and backlit, shows a very large American flag hanging vertically from the ceiling girders inside a cavernous industrial warehouse or factory with sunlight streaming through overhead skylights. The flag is at center, lit so its red, white and blue glow against the darker shadowed rafters. Across the bottom, large all-caps white text with a soft glow in a condensed stencil/industrial typeface reads 'PROTECTING THE AMERICAN WORKFORCE' and beneath it in white italic serif: '$1M Recovered for Warehouse Workers Denied Pay.'
notable_text: PROTECTING THE AMERICAN WORKFORCE; $1M Recovered for Warehouse Workers Denied Pay
